title: RewardSpec
description: Machine-readable spec of the GRPO scalar reward. PLAN.md §1.4. FROZEN CONTRACT. reward.py must implement this exactly.

explanation_rubric.judge: separate strong model (Anthropic/Claude); NEVER the trained eval agent (avoids circularity)
explanation_rubric.output: scalar 0..1, thresholded; used only when localization_correct is true

stretch_hook_design_y.note: DO NOT IMPLEMENT YET. When the gate head exists, add: reward -= lambda * tokens_used.
